goals: Each God class file reduced to ÔëĄ500 lines

stories.title: Fix null-aware operator bugs in collection_screen.dart
stories.userStory: As a player, I want the collection screen to load without crashes so I can view my cards reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove unnecessary `?.` operator at `collection_screen.dart:166:85`
Remove unnecessary `?.` operator at `collection_screen.dart:166:135`
Run `flutter analyze` ÔÇö zero warnings in collection_screen.dart
stories.technicalNotes: The list items are guaranteed non-null at this point. Change `widget.cards[index]?.name` to `widget.cards[index].name`.

stories.title: Remove dead code
stories.userStory: As a developer, I want unused code removed so the codebase is easier to navigate and maintain.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove unused import `package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart` from `main.dart`
Remove unused imports from `challenge_provider.dart` (`team_model.dart`, `auth_provider.dart`)
Remove unused import `dart:math` from `challenge_screen.dart`
Remove unused field `_isInitialized` from `node_backend_service.dart`
Remove unused field `_isSocketConnected` from `backend_test_screen.dart`
Remove unused declarations: `_pollNodeMatchState`, `_QuickActionCard`
Remove 14+ unused local variables across match_provider.dart, match_engine.dart
Run `flutter analyze` ÔÇö warnings reduced by Ôëą15
edgeCases: Verify removing imports doesn't break other imports that depend on them
Some variables may be used for future features ÔÇö confirm before removing

stories.title: Add const constructors
stories.userStory: As a player, I want the app to load faster so the experience feels snappier.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in challenge_screen.dart (8 instances)
Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in dashboard_screen.dart (3 instances)
Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in live_match_screen.dart (6 instances)
Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in market_screen.dart (4 instances)
Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in match_history_screen.dart (2+ instances)
Add `const` to 23+ widget constructors in login_screen.dart (1 instance)
Run `flutter analyze` ÔÇö zero `prefer_const_constructors` info messages
stories.technicalNotes: Flutter recommends const constructors for widgets that never change ÔÇö enables compile-time constant folding and better performance.

stories.title: Extract God Class ÔÇö Match Provider
stories.userStory: As a developer, I want match_provider.dart split into focused modules so I can debug and extend match logic without understanding the entire system.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract WebSocket handling into `match_websocket_service.dart`
Extract match state management into `match_state_machine.dart`
Extract API calls into `match_api_service.dart`
Keep match_provider.dart as a thin orchestrator (ÔëĄ200 lines)
All existing functionality preserved ÔÇö run full match flow test
No new warnings introduced
stories.technicalNotes: Current match_provider.dart is 1,474 lines. Target: ÔëĄ200 lines after extraction.
edgeCases: WebSocket reconnection logic must remain intact
Multiplayer matches share some state ÔÇö ensure separation doesn't break it
Match history save/load must continue working

stories.title: Extract God Class ÔÇö Dashboard Screen
stories.userStory: As a developer, I want dashboard_screen.dart split into composable widgets so I can modify stats, quick actions, and navigation independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract `_StatsOverviewCard` Ôćĺ `stats_overview_card.dart`
Extract `_QuickActionCard` Ôćĺ `quick_action_card.dart`
Extract `_MatchHistoryPreview` Ôćĺ `match_history_preview.dart`
Extract `_PlayerRankCard` Ôćĺ `player_rank_card.dart`
Keep dashboard_screen.dart as a layout coordinator (ÔëĄ300 lines)
All navigation and state bindings work correctly
Run `flutter analyze` ÔÇö zero errors
stories.technicalNotes: Current dashboard_screen.dart is 2,063 lines. Target: ÔëĄ300 lines after extraction.
edgeCases: Bottom navigation bar interactions must remain functional
Pull-to-refresh on dashboard must still trigger data reload

stories.title: Unit tests for match provider
stories.userStory: As a developer, I want unit tests for core match logic so I can refactor with confidence and catch regressions early.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for `startMatch()` ÔÇö successful start, network failure
Add tests for match state transitions (idle Ôćĺ simulating Ôćĺ completed)
Add tests for score calculation
Add tests for WebSocket reconnection logic
Achieve Ôëą80% code coverage on match_provider.dart
Tests run with `flutter test`
edgeCases: Mock WebSocket to avoid real network calls in tests
Test edge cases: empty squad, disconnected mid-match

stories.title: Create API service layer for backend
stories.userStory: As a developer, I want backend API calls abstracted into a service layer so I can switch between staging/prod environments without code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `lib/core/api_config.dart` with base URL from environment config
Move hardcoded URLs from `node_backend_service.dart` to config
Support dev/staging/prod environment switching
All existing API calls continue to work
Add integration test for API config switching
stories.technicalNotes: node_backend_service.dart currently has hardcoded API URLs. Extract to centralized config.
edgeCases: Handle missing environment config gracefully (fallback to dev)
Verify WebSocket URLs are also externalized
